slots.label: font-mono text-ctl-xs tracking-field-label uppercase text-base-content/62
slots.field: appearance-none w-full h-ctl-h pl-3 pr-9 bg-base-300 text-base-content border-[length:var(--bw)] border-base-300 rounded-sm font-body text-ctl cursor-pointer transition-[border-color] duration-[var(--dur-fast)] ease-out focus:border-secondary focus:ring-[length:var(--focus-width)] focus:ring-secondary/16 focus:outline-none
slots.caret: absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 pointer-events-none text-base-content/62 text-[length:var(--icon-sm)]
